zh.title: 开箱即用的 AI Prompt 工作流库
zh.subtitle: 沉淀真实场景中反复使用的 Prompt，把技术协作、外包沟通、内容创作和个人效率，做成可以直接复制使用的工作流。
zh.meta: PromptForge 是开箱即用的 AI Prompt 工作流库，沉淀技术协作、外包沟通、内容创作和个人效率场景中的可复用 Prompt。

en.title: Ready-to-use AI prompt workflows
en.subtitle: Practical prompts refined from real workflows, covering technical collaboration, freelance communication, content creation, and personal productivity.
en.meta: PromptForge is a ready-to-use AI prompt workflow library for technical collaboration, freelance communication, content creation, and personal productivity.

zh.title: 推荐入口
zh.description: 先用一个高层判断入口，把需求、风险和执行边界收住。

en.title: Featured
en.description: Start with a high-level judgment prompt before turning a request into execution.

zh.title: Tech Lead 技术判断
zh.description: 进入 GPT + Codex 协作前，先判断方案、边界、风险和最小执行路径。

en.title: Tech Lead Agent
en.description: Before GPT + Codex execution, judge the solution, scope, risks, and smallest implementation path.

zh.title: 技术协作
zh.description: 用于 Bug 定位、性能优化、数据库、缓存、接口评审、架构和发布监控等技术场景。

en.title: Technical Collaboration
en.description: For debugging, performance, databases, cache, API review, architecture, release, and monitoring.

zh.title: 外包 / 接单
zh.description: 用于甲方沟通、需求边界、报价工期、验收售后和范围控制。

en.title: Freelance & Client Work
en.description: For client communication, scope boundaries, pricing, timelines, acceptance, and support.

zh.title: 内容创作
zh.description: 用于选题、标题、短文案、社交平台内容和创作流程。

en.title: Content Creation
en.description: For topics, titles, short copy, social posts, and repeatable content workflows.

zh.title: 个人效率
zh.description: 用于学习计划、英语聊天、日常决策和个人工作流。

en.title: Personal Productivity
en.description: For learning plans, English practice, daily decisions, and personal workflows.

zh.title: AI 协作方法
zh.description: 用于 GPT 与 Codex 的分工、任务拆分、审查和执行规范。

en.title: AI Collaboration Methods
en.description: For GPT and Codex roles, task framing, review, and execution rules.
